title: felicia flava
intro: Felicia flava, also known as the yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is commonly used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Felicia flava include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
